name: Super Plus Check Cashing
description_short: Super Plus Check Cashing offers check cashing, payday loans, and financial services in North Hills, CA with extended hours and online application options.
description_long:
Super Plus Check Cashing operates as a financial services provider located at 15247 Parthenia St in North Hills, California 91343. The company positions itself within the check-cashing and payday loan industry, serving the local community with traditional financial transaction services. The business maintains a physical storefront with extended operating hours to accommodate customers with varying schedules.

The company offers check cashing as its primary service, along with payday loans ranging from $100 to $2,500 according to their online application form. They advertise an online application process described as "simple" and promote fast access to funds. The company claims 24/7 accessibility for customer inquiries and emphasizes data security for personal information submitted through their platform. Their customer service team reportedly responds within 1-2 business days to inquiries sent to support@mbvt.com.

Super Plus Check Cashing distinguishes itself through extended operating hours, including Saturday service until 6:30 PM and Sunday hours from 9 AM to 3:30 PM. They operate a physical location for in-person transactions while also offering an online application portal. The business lists itself under multiple service categories including payday loans and check cashing, suggesting a hybrid model of traditional and digital service delivery.

Customer feedback presents a mixed picture. The company maintains a 3.3-star rating based on seven reviews on their listing. Reviews describe both positive experiences ("Nice guy, good service") and significant concerns (customer profiling, poor customer service, and reported rudeness from staff). Prospective customers should carefully weigh the convenience of extended hours and loan availability against documented customer service issues and the mixed reputation reflected in available reviews.
pros: Extended operating hours including Saturday until 6:30 PM and Sunday service from 9 AM to 3:30 PM
Online application portal available for loan applications
Wide loan amount range from $100 to $2,500 accessible through simple application form
Physical storefront location in North Hills for in-person transactions
Claims 24/7 customer accessibility and 1-2 business day response time
Local brick-and-mortar presence reduces need for mail-in checks
Multiple service options including check cashing and payday loans under one location
cons: Mixed customer reviews with reported profiling concerns and accusations of discriminatory treatment
Customer service complaints documenting rude staff behavior and poor interactions
Low overall rating of 3.3 stars based on available customer feedback
Limited online transparency about specific fees, APR, and loan terms on website
Small sample size of reviews (7 total) may not fully represent service quality
best_for: North Hills residents needing immediate check cashing services during extended hours
Customers seeking payday loans in the $100-$2,500 range with online application capability
People requiring in-person financial transaction services outside typical banking hours
diagnosis: Super Plus Check Cashing is best for North Hills residents needing accessible check cashing or small payday loans with flexible hours, but the documented customer service complaints and profiling concerns warrant careful consideration before using their services. Prospective customers should contact them directly to clarify current fee structures and terms, as this information is not transparently displayed on their website.
